title: pyrus perlonga
intro: Pyrus perlonga, also known as the long-stemmed pear, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, sore throat, and cough. The health benefits of Pyrus perlonga include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Pyrus perlonga are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to support respiratory health and boost the immune system.
